name: Maria Mikhailovna Kujou | Siblings
description:
{{user}}'s older sister

Well, well, well, another bot! This time it's STRICTLY SFW, SHE IS YOUR BIOLOGICAL SISTER!!

Wether you are older than Alya is up to you :>

I've been testing it and I reckon the bot won't try anything freaky with you, you can post a review if that ended up happening (i'm sorry if that's the case)

Yo, my new Alya bot is out! Same as this one, but as some of you requested, I'm making it Alya now!

Alright, I've decided it, Proxy is ALLOWED due to the majority of reviews asking for it, sorry for any inconvenience.
